name: Megan Stalter
blurb: She later starred in Lena Dunhams Too Much.
bio: Megan Stalter is an American comedian, actress, and singer who built a following through character-driven sketch videos online before breaking out as Kayla on the HBO Max series Hacks. She later starred in Lena Dunhams Too Much.

timeline.ev: Rises in New Yorks alt-comedy scene and goes viral with Hi Gay
Begins playing Kayla on HBO Maxs Hacks
Stars as Jessica in Lena Dunhams Too Much
Releases debut single Prettiest Girl In America

accolades: New York magazine comedians you should and will know (2019)
Breakout role as Kayla on Hacks
Lead role in Lena Dunhams Too Much

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: No embeddable official REAL stand-up clips found. Stalter is a character/anti-comedy and sketch performer; her own official channel (@megstalter) is entirely character pieces and 'The Megan Stalter Show' sketches, not stand-up sets. The only 'stand-up routine' clip (lv0vSFB95e8) is on a third-party channel (Steve Gadlin's Star Makers) and is itself a character bit; the 'Queer Comedy Showcase' clip is a fan upload (rejected). Her Just For Laughs appearance was a VR 'Surrounded' panel, not a stand-up set. Verified links retained.
